arts.ttl: Tottenham still attractive for new signings - Postecoglou
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou insists Tottenham remains an attractive proposition for new players and says the club is "exploring some opportunities" before the transfer deadline.

arts.ttl: Still a big club – Ange Postecoglou says Spurs remain attractive for new players
arts.sum: Tottenham are in desperate need of reinforcements with nine players still absent for Sunday’s trip to Brentford.

arts.ttl: Tottenham boss Ange Postecoglou insists his side can 'relaunch' their dismal campaign... as a host of injured stars gear up for an imminent return
arts.sum: Tottenham are just a fortnight away from a major reset that their under pressure Ange manager Postecoglou believes can relaunch their ailing season.

arts.ttl: Sources: Mathys Tel rejects chance to join Spurs
arts.sum: Tel has informed Bayern of his intention to explore new opportunities in the January transfer window and sources told ESPN that Spurs had a €60 million ($62.5m) offer for the player accepted by the Bundesliga giants on Thursday. Tottenham Hotspur's hopes of bolstering their injury-depleted squad were dented on Friday after Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel rejected the opportunity to join Ange Postecoglou's side, sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Tottenham in Tomori talks - Saturday's gossip
arts.sum: Tottenham in Fikayo Tomori talks, Mathys Tel rejects Tottenham move, Chelsea join Evan Ferguson race, plus more.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Tottenham launch shock Alejandro Garnacho bid after being snubbed by Man Utd target
arts.sum: Manchester United winger Alejandro Garnacho is already a target for Chelsea but now has interest from Tottenham, who've been rejected by Bayern Munich's Mathys Tel despite agreeing a £50million deal

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Mathys Tel rejects lucrative move to Tottenham
arts.sum: Multiple sources are currently reporting that Mathys Tel has rejected an offer to move to north London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham make enquiry for Man United's Alejandro Garnacho after they were REJECTED by Bayern Munich winger Mathys Tel
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Tottenham have made an enquiry for Manchester United's Alejandro Garnacho after missing out on Mathys Tel from Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel informed Tottenham of his intention to remain at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich centre-forward Mathys Tel (19) has informed Tottenham Hotspur of his intention to remain with the Bundesliga giants, according to The Athletic’s David Ornstein. The North London-based club previously…

arts.ttl: 'That's what you need': Paul Merson tells Arsenal to hijack Spurs move for 'impressive' £25m player now
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham Hotspur are both looking at more signings in order to help them kick on for the remainder of the season. Although Arsenal...
